title: The Apple Watch
content:
My Apple Watch arrived today.

Actually it arrived since April 28 in Japan. (I ordered it from Apple Store Japan.)

I am not going to review it. People have done it everywhere already.

I am just going to say that it feels good.

I do not have many apps installed. I am going to gently get along with the Watch.

Let’s just say, I like it a lot.

And I do not understand those journalists who said they stopped using the Watch.
